project_name: Gyansai Maths IIT Center Test Portal

rules.headings: Use tracking-tight for H1/H2. Never center by default. Left-aligned for analytical/academic rigor.
rules.overline: Uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em] for category tags (e.g., SUBJECT: PHYSICS).
rules.body: leading-relaxed for reading clarity in exam questions.

rules.primary_usage: Use International Klein Blue (#002FA7) ONLY for primary actions (Start Exam, Buy Course, Submit). Do not use for decorative backgrounds.
rules.contrast: Adhere strictly to APCA contrast ratios. Ensure equations and reading materials are high-contrast. Never use pure #000000 for large background areas, use #050505.

layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with tight gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized. h-full on children.
layout_and_spacing.marketing_grid: Bento Grid: Asymmetrical combinations, gap-8 to gap-12.
layout_and_spacing.exam_portal_layout: Strict 2-column or 3-column layout. Main content (Question) takes 75%, Question Palette takes 25%. Fixed height viewport (h-screen), overflow-y-auto strictly for question area.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-aligned content. Only center marketing hero text if absolutely necessary.

surface_styles.cards: Grid Borders: Flat backgrounds, 1px solid border, no shadow. Technical and precise. Expose the skeleton.
surface_styles.exam_palette: Neumorphism avoided. Use solid borders and high contrast color codes for Not Visited (Gray), Answered (Green), Mark for Review (Warning Yellow).
surface_styles.glassmorphism: Only for sticky navbars (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 or bg-black/60) with 1px bottom border.
surface_styles.corners: rounded-none or rounded-sm. Sharp edges convey precision and math.
surface_styles.hover_states: Crisp translate-y-[-2px] with a sharp shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] (in light mode) for a brutalist/tactile feel. Dark mode uses white shadow.

components.buttons: Square or rounded-sm. Solid primary color. High contrast.
components.inputs: Shadcn standard but with rounded-sm and sharp focus rings (ring-2 ring-primary).
components.tables: Dense. border-collapse. Alternating row colors for easy scanning of large student datasets.
components.charts: Recharts. Use monochromatic blue scales with one contrasting accent (e.g., Red for negative marking) for clarity.
components.exam_timer: Sticky top right. Use JetBrains Mono for numbers. Turns red (accent_danger) in last 5 minutes.

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Instant or very fast fade. No bouncy animations. Serious academic tool.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicit hover text color changes (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).
motion_and_interactions.question_navigation: Instant transition. No sliding animations to prevent distraction.

icons_and_assets.rules: Keep icons minimal. Use mathematical symbols where appropriate instead of generic icons.

media.hero_description: A focused Indian student studying at a laptop, setting the tone for hard work and academic dedication.
media.usage_instructions: Use math_texture as a low-opacity (5-10%) overlay background for the hero section or login page. Use hero_image in the marketing page bento grid. Do not use placeholder images.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid. Examples: data-testid='start-exam-btn', data-testid='admin-login-tab', data-testid='question-palette-btn-4', data-testid='submit-exam-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize Tailwind config with the specified colors and fonts.
Import Cabinet Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono via CDN or Fontsource.
Build the dashboard using pure grid layouts with 1px solid borders (The 'Technical' Look).
Do not use generic border-radius (e.g., rounded-xl) everywhere. Stick to rounded-sm or rounded-none.
For the exam portal, ensure the layout is rigid (no global page scrolling), only the question area should scroll.
Implement high-contrast states for the Question Palette: Answered = Green (#38A169), Not Visited = White/Gray, Marked for Review = Warning Yellow (#D69E2E).
Install @phosphor-icons/react. Add data-testid to every interactive component.
For charts, use Recharts with strict colors matching the theme.
